source_message: Oracle D1: A+ long via MULTI-ALIGNMENT (the two-and-one — 5m bull FVG rebalance + 1m bear->bull iFVG in one). Bias ~2/3 bullish elevated by the entry. Entry ~25632 (1m bullish-inversion close on the reclaim ~09:54-09:56 inside the 5m bull FVG, after swing-tier bull MSS 09:47 + 5m FVG CE-tap at the 25611 pullback). Stop ~25605 (below the 25611 reclaim low). Executable no-lookahead TP1 is packet-time NYAM.H 25696.75; Lanto target cluster remains NYAM.H ~25707 / LO.H 25723 (~2.6-3R). TP2 AS.H 25855.25 (HIT, ran to 25864); ultimate PWH 26536.

oracle_target_cluster.note: Lanto target cluster; not forced into the executable closed-bar packet because 25707 is absent from the 09:54-09:56 evidence window.
